Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We can see three distinct patients based on age and gender Patient A 45 M Patient B 62 F Patient C 28 M

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events for the same patient should have consistent patient age and patient gender Events for the same patient should follow a logical order registration triage consultation treatment discharge

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Patient A 45 M Event 1 Register patient in ER Event 4 Initial triage in ER Event 7 X ray imaging in Radiology Event 12 Doctor consultation in ER diagnosis hairline fracture Event 15 Patient discharged from ER

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These events form a coherent story registration triage X ray for leg diagnosis of hairline fracture discharge

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Patient B 62 F Event 2 Register patient in ER Event 5 Initial triage in ER Event 8 Lab test requested in ER Event 10 Lab test completed in Laboratory Event 11 Doctor consultation in ER diagnosis minor infection Event 14 Prescription created in ER medication antibiotics Event 17 Patient discharged from ER

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This forms a coherent story registration triage lab test consultation prescription discharge

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Patient C 28 M Event 3 Register patient in Surgery department Event 6 Doctor consultation in Surgery reason scheduled knee surgery Event 9 Surgery preparation in Surgery Event 13 Surgery performed in Surgery procedure arthroscopy Event 16 Recovery room in Surgery Event 18 Patient discharged from Surgery

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This is a clear surgical pathway registration consultation preparation surgery recovery discharge

Name: Validation - PE
Text: All events are accounted for So we have three cases Case 1 Patient A 45 M events 1 4 7 12 15 Case 2 Patient B 62 F events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Case 3 Patient C 28 M events 3 6 9 13 16 18

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For Case 1 Events in chronological order 1 4 7 12 15 Logical For Case 2 Events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Logical For Case 3 Events 3 6 9 13 16 18 Logical
